/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/exam_scheduler.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exam_scheduler.dir/src/Date.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exam_scheduler.dir/src/Domain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exam_scheduler.dir/src/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exam_scheduler.dir/src/Preprocessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exam_scheduler.dir/src/Scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exam_scheduler.dir/src/OutputWriter.cpp.o -o exam_scheduler
